author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Plan: self-heal at the commit site (issue #565's option 3). Add SyncManager::repair_stale_signingkey that reads user.signingkey from the cache worktree, expands tilde, and if the value is a path that doesn't exist, delegates to the existing fallback_to_driver_signing to rewrite config.worktree (driver key if present, disable signing otherwise). Wire into git_commit_in_cache as a best-effort preamble so every commit self-heals. Factor tilde-expansion into a shared helper so both sites agree. Skip validation when signingkey value looks like literal key material ('ssh-...', '-----BEGIN') rather than a path. Tests: stale path gets repaired; valid path no-op; literal-key skipped; missing signingkey no-op.
